Bug / Task Description: A shard transfer must be rejected when the declared source node is not the shard's current owner, to guard against stale or conflicting reassignments. The precondition guards on the wrong field, so a transfer naming an incorrect source node is accepted and silently reassigns the shard. Legitimate transfers (correct source) still succeed, so only the ownership-protection invariant is broken.
Commit Subject: fix(shard): validate current owner before transfer
